plugins.name: github-direnv
plugins.description: Folder-scoped GitHub authentication via direnv (auto-switch gh / git push by directory).

plugins.name: claude-session-to-md
plugins.description: Convert Claude Code session jsonl logs into per-session markdown files for archive/search.

plugins.name: blog-illustrate
plugins.description: Generate clean illustrations (terminal mockups, decision trees, comparison cards) for blog posts. HTML/CSS → Playwright PNG → blog MCP upload → body insertion.

plugins.name: ralph-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap a Ralph loop scaffold (specs/, TODO.md, PROMPT.md, decisions.md, progress.md) from a one-sentence goal — state files for running Claude in a fixed-prompt while-loop.
